mapper.select: select LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(ifnull(sequence,'0'), 1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 4, '0') from t_erp_ship_v2_inboundshipment_customs_xml where groupid=#{groupid} and xml_type=#{xmlType} AND YEAR(app_time) = YEAR(#{appTime}) AND MONTH(app_time) = MONTH(#{appTime}) AND DAY(app_time) = DAY(#{appTime}) order by sequence desc limit 1
